/*
  src/components/Instructions.jsx
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  WHY THIS FILE:
    Shows ceremony instructions (dress code, travel) in an accordion
    so the page doesn't become a wall of text.  Clicking a category
    toggles its detail panel open/closed.

  STATE:
    openId — the id of the currently open accordion item (or null).
*/import React,{useState}from'react';import{instructions}from'../data/content';import'./Sections.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Instructions=()=>{const[openId,setOpenId]=useState(instructions[0].id);const toggle=id=>setOpenId(curr=>curr===id?null:id);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"instructions",className:"section bg-white",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"section-header reveal",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title",children:"Instructions to Candidates"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"divider"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"section-subtitle",children:"Please read all guidelines carefully before attending the ceremony"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"accordion reveal",children:instructions.map(item=>{const isOpen=openId===item.id;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`accordion__item ${isOpen?'accordion__item--open':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"accordion__trigger",onClick:()=>toggle(item.id),"aria-expanded":isOpen,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"accordion__icon",children:item.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"accordion__category",children:item.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"accordion__chevron",children:isOpen?'▲':'▼'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"accordion__body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"instruction-list",children:item.items.map((point,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"instruction-list__item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"instruction-list__bullet"}),point]},i))}),item.note&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"instruction__note",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Note:"})," ",item.note]})]})]},item.id);})})]})});};export default Instructions;
